behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names scripts/build/bun.ts, scripts/build/compile.ts, CLAUDE.md, the compileC function, cc/cxx calls, depOutputs, codegen.cppAll, implicitInputs, orderOnlyInputs — all the keys tests inspect.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what's broken and the intent (use implicit vs order-only), without giving specific code replacements or line numbers.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for .a/.lib files in implicitInputs and codegen/.h in orderOnlyInputs — behavioral, not tied to specific variable names like codegenOrderOnly.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute the TS code via bun/deno/tsx and inspect the recorded Ninja build nodes; only CLAUDE.md test is text-based.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub returning empty implicitInputs would fail hasImplicitDepOutputs assertions; the test requires actual .a files in implicitInputs.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover cc implicit deps, no-PCH cxx implicit deps, separation from codegen, and CLAUDE.md update — matching the four instruction items.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped by section headers (fail-to-pass pr_diff, agent_config, pass-to-pass) with descriptive docstrings.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task modifies build scripts and documentation, not a structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths (scripts/build/bun.ts, compile.ts, CLAUDE.md) and identifiers (depOutputs, codegen.cppAll, implicitInputs) are consistent across instruction and tests.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction references functions/branches (compileC, else branch when pch_file not set) but doesn't give exact line numbers; localization is part of the task domain.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: CLAUDE.md edit is a localized Gotchas section update, not a full rewrite, and aligns with the code changes.
